channel.title: Serverless on David Gomez - Technology & Business Insights
channel.description: Recent content in Serverless on David Gomez - Technology & Business Insights

item.title: Apache Spark lineage now available in Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio for IDC based domains
item.description:
Introduction

In a significant announcement that has captured the attention of technology professionals worldwide, AWS News has unveiled Apache Spark lineage now available in Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio for IDC based domains. This development represents a major milestone in the ongoing evolution of cloud computing and enterprise technology solutions.

This significant development was originally reported by AWS News, highlighting the ongoing evolution in the technology landscape. As organizations continue to navigate digital transformation, understanding these advancements becomes crucial for staying competitive.

item.title: Amazon Redshift now supports allocating extra compute for automatic optimizations
item.description:
Introduction

In a significant announcement that has captured the attention of technology professionals worldwide, AWS News has unveiled Amazon Redshift now supports allocating extra compute for automatic optimizations. This development represents a major milestone in the ongoing evolution of cloud computing and enterprise technology solutions.

This significant development was originally reported by AWS News, highlighting the ongoing evolution in the technology landscape. As organizations continue to navigate digital transformation, understanding these advancements becomes crucial for staying competitive.

Introduction

In a significant announcement that has captured the attention of technology professionals worldwide, AWS News has unveiled Amazon Bedrock adds support for six fully-managed open weights models. item.description:
Introduction

In a significant announcement that has captured the attention of technology professionals worldwide, AWS News has unveiled Amazon Athena now supports 1-minute reservations and 4 DPU minimum capacity.
